{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "afe350562f2b73b3",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Tutorial 01 - read() and ReadConfig"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c19be09dada8269a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "58397ba8ff808582",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:36.128823300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:30.026815600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "15f2f46a15571cc3",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "The raw data used in this example is saved under the following path:"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "7af553025c97dd2d",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:36.141812400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:36.130854700Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "data_folder_path = Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\""
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e2db0d4a9419dc8d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "The raw example data used in this example looks like this:"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "8751e097bcfc3f4e",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.220628200Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:36.143890100Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "from pandas import read_excel\n",
    "\n",
    "sheets = read_excel(data_folder_path / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\", sheet_name=None, engine=\"calamine\")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "d8235c6947babeb",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.310421100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.223259300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "sheet_names = list(sheets.keys())\n",
    "\n",
    "for sheet_name in sheet_names[3:5]:\n",
    "    print(f\"\\nSheet: {sheet_name}\")\n",
    "    display(sheets[sheet_name].head(6))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Show remaining sheet names\n",
    "print(\"\\n... more sheets:\")\n",
    "print(\", \".join(sheet_names[:3] + sheet_names[5:]))"
   ],
   "outputs": [

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b242778209a03f82",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "c3fcfe2cc5eee2be",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.318889900Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.312929200Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2dd0db10ded23a07",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 1: Read the data and convert it into the standardized format"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1fbdda59c97689fc",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-info\">\n",
    "<b>Hint:</b> You can type in \"eet.ReadConfig.\" to see all availiable Reader Configurations in most IDEs\n",
    "</div>"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "7d2cb8e21fc032cb",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.326497Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.320517600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "config = eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 6
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "74b5b34d581001c3",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:43.548796400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-09T11:05:39.326497Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(input_path=str(data_folder_path / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"), config=config)"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 7
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "319cac8aaa58c10e",
   "metadata": {},

   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-warning\">\n",
    "<b>Warning:</b> Columns that contain only empty values are assigned the \"object\" dtype. After saving and reloading the file, pandas may silently infer a different dtype for these columns unless the dtype is explicitly defined during import. That's why we opted to directly initalize them with \"object\" dtype.\n",
    "</div>"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-info\">\n",

    "</div>"
